name: browser
description: Control Chrome through the Anybox browser extension and browser MCP connector.

interface.shortDescription: Use Chrome tabs through the Anybox browser extension.
interface.longDescription: A built-in plugin that enables browser MCP tools through the shared Anybox browser connector and Chrome extension bridge.

permissions: Read Chrome tab titles, URLs, visible page text, interactive elements, and screenshots.
Open, activate, click, scroll, type into, and fill Chrome tabs through the Anybox browser extension.
connectorRequirements.reason: Browser control through the shared Anybox browser connector.
